deprecations.replacement: Import Markup from markupsafe instead: `from markupsafe import Markup`. flask.Markup was deprecated in Flask 2.3 and removed in Flask 3.0.
Subclass flask.json.provider.DefaultJSONProvider and assign it to app.json instead of subclassing JSONEncoder. JSONEncoder was removed in Flask 2.3.
before_first_request was removed in Flask 2.3. Run startup code inside create_app() or via `with app.app_context(): ...` from a CLI entry point.
signals_available was removed in Flask 2.3 — blinker is now a hard dependency. Drop the guard and import signals unconditionally.
Set PERMANENT_SESSION_LIFETIME on app.config (a timedelta), not on the session object. The session attribute was never the supported assignment site.
Use urllib.parse equivalents (quote, unquote, urlencode). werkzeug.urls helpers were deprecated in Werkzeug 2.3 and removed in Werkzeug 3.0.
Model.query is the legacy Flask-SQLAlchemy 2.x API. Use SQLAlchemy 2.0 style: db.session.execute(db.select(Model).where(...)).scalars().all() — or db.session.get(Model, id) for primary-key lookups.
app.json_encoder / app.json_decoder were deprecated in Flask 2.2. Subclass DefaultJSONProvider and assign: app.json = CustomJSONProvider(app).
werkzeug.contrib was removed in Werkzeug 1.0. Replacements live in dedicated packages (e.g. werkzeug.middleware.proxy_fix.ProxyFix replaced werkzeug.contrib.fixers.ProxyFix).
